ORDER RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND FOR SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF YAHOR ZGURSKI'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING DEFENDANTS RESPONSES TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. SANCTIONS OF $750 IMPOSED AGAINST DEFENDANTS. THE COURT NOTES THAT A FEW OF THE OUTSTANDING REQUESTS (INTERROGATORY NO. 12; RFPD NOS. 2, 10, 13, 55) POTENTIALLY IMPLICATE THE FINANCIAL PRIVACY RIGHTS OF THIRD PARTIES. AS TO THESE REQUESTS ONLY, THIS ORDER IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO A SUBSEQUENT MOTION TO ASSURE THAT THE PRIVACY RIGHTS OF THESE INDIVIDUALS ARE PROPERLY PROTECTED IF THIS INFORMATION IS PRODUCED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial (No appearance by defendant(s).
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Alexei Kuchinsky, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff YAHOR ZGURSKI.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant LYUDMILA GRECHKO, individually; and V & K, a California Limited Liability Company.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-25 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Yahor Zgurski sworn and examined on his own behalf.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Principal $90,430.00
Pre-Judgment Interest $8,572.00
Attorney's Fees $30,518.00
Costs $950.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $130,470.00
Judgment signed in open court.

Appearances: Alexei Kuchinsky of the Klein Law Group (415.693.9107) for plaintiff and moving party; No other appearances.

There being no other appearances, parties who are not present are deemed to have stipulated to Judge Pro Tem Katherine Huibonhoa deciding this matter. The matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, for the reasons set forth in the moving papers. The motion is unopposed. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Defts Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents And Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alexei Kuchinsky, Esq., 415.693.9107, for plaintiff Yahor Zgurski; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF YAHOR ZGURSKI's Motion For Order Compelling Defendants Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents And Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And For Sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Sanctions of $750 imposed against Defendants. The Court notes that a few of the outstanding requests (Interrogatory No. 12; RFPD Nos. 2, 10, 13, 55) potentially implicate the financial privacy rights of third parties. As to these requests only, this order is without prejudice to a subsequent motion to assure that the privacy rights of these individuals are properly protected if this information is produced. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem David McDonald, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.
